---
title: "Analyze Social Learning"
output: html_document
---

This notebook is a lightweight starting point for social learning analysis. It
expects a player-round CSV with estimate and group-average fields.

```{r}
input_path <- "../../sample_data/llm_only/social_learning/player_round.csv"

if (file.exists(input_path)) {
  data <- read.csv(input_path)
  aggregate(action_value ~ round + actor_type, data = data, FUN = mean)
} else {
  message("Sample data not found yet. Generate or copy player-round data before knitting.")
}
```

Use group-round summaries when asking whether information sharing changes group
outcomes.
